+++ head/devel/p5-DateConvert/Makefile	Sun May 25 12:41:53 2014	(r355230)

 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	Date
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org

 COMMENT=	Perl5 module to convert dates between any two calendar formats
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 USES=		perl5
 USE_PERL5=	configure
